case=workflow helper text fixture=home-f.output:
Workflow model registry:
Profiles:
  profile:claude-best
    claude:fable@high
    claude:opus@xhigh
Defaults:
  orchestrator  profile:claude-best
  reviewer      codex:gpt-5.6-sol@high
  implementer   codex:gpt-5.6-sol@high
  review        minimum score 90; maximum rounds 3
Exact targets: <tool>:<model>@<effort>[+fast]
Fast: append +fast to a Codex exact target. Without +fast, Codex roles use Standard.
Compatibility: +fast requires a Docks consumer that supports workflow record schema 2.
Availability: checked when used by Docks; docks-kit does not probe providers.

case=workflow review bound invalid fixtu.output:
Workflow model registry:
Profiles:
  profile:claude-best
    claude:fable@high
    claude:opus@xhigh
Defaults:
  orchestrator  profile:claude-best
  reviewer      codex:gpt-5.6-sol@high
  implementer   codex:gpt-5.6-sol@high
  review        minimum score 90; maximum rounds 3
Exact targets: <tool>:<model>@<effort>[+fast]
Fast: append +fast to a Codex exact target. Without +fast, Codex roles use Standard.
Compatibility: +fast requires a Docks consumer that supports workflow record schema 2.
Availability: checked when used by Docks; docks-kit does not probe providers.

Workflow override flags:
  --model-orchestrator=<profile:name|tool:model@effort[+fast]>
  --model-reviewer=<profile:name|tool:model@effort[+fast]>
  --model-implementer=<profile:name|tool:model@effort[+fast]>
  --review-min-score=<0..100>
  --review-max-rounds=<1..10>
[1;31m[err][0m max_rounds must be an integer in 1..10

case=workflow role override fixture=home.output:
[1;32m[ok][0m Workflow models updated in Claude and Codex instructions
[1;33m[warn][0m Start fresh Claude Code and Codex sessions before relying on the new workflow roles

fixture=home-drift cmd=model claude.output:
deployed: sonnet
SoT:      fable
Available claude models (kit-verified 2026-07-08 — SoT/models.json):
  best  — Fable 5 where the org has access, latest Opus otherwise (Claude Code >=2.1.170)
  opus  — latest Opus (currently Opus 4.8)
  fable  — Fable 5 — the kit SoT default; needs org access + Claude Code >=2.1.170
  sonnet  — latest Sonnet (currently Sonnet 5)
  haiku  — latest Haiku (currently Haiku 4.5)
  default  — engine pseudo-value: deletes the deployed model key so the account default applies
  claude-fable-5  — Fable 5
  claude-opus-4-8  — Opus 4.8
  claude-sonnet-5  — Sonnet 5
  claude-haiku-4-5-20251001  — Haiku 4.5
  (full claude-* model IDs outside the catalog are accepted with a warning)
